TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 ACURA MDX. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE LED HEADLAMPS FAILED TO FUNCTION IN GENERAL AND DURING INCLEMENT WEATHER. THE DEALER (MIKE HALE ACURA, 5601 STATE ST, MURRAY, UT 84107, (801) 263-0202) WAS CONTACTED SEVERAL TIMES TO REACH THE MANUFACTURER TO DETE

narrative.headline: What 2015 Acura Mdx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 69 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (22% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
